authors.rationale: Credits the contributors and aids in author disambiguation.

year.rationale: Helps to contextualize the research within a timeline.

abstract.rationale: Provides a concise overview of the research focus and findings.

doi.rationale: A unique identifier for accessing the paper online.

venue.rationale: Indicates the conference or journal where the paper is published.

research_focus.description: Core research focus of the paper
research_focus.rationale: Defines the main theme or topic of the research.

main_topic.rationale: Identifies the primary area of investigation.

sub_topics.rationale: Highlights specific aspects or techniques addressed in the research.

methodology.rationale: Describes the approach taken to conduct the research.

data_sets.rationale: Essential for understanding the data foundation of the research.

architectures.rationale: Indicates the specific models used for analysis.

evaluation_metrics.rationale: Clarifies how the performance of the models is assessed.

results.rationale: Summarizes the outcomes and implications of the study.

performance.rationale: Provides quantitative insights into the effectiveness of the proposed methods.

challenges.rationale: Highlights limitations and areas needing further research.

future_directions.rationale: Indicates potential avenues for further investigation and development.

author_contributions.rationale: Clarifies the roles of each author in the research.

contributor_roles.rationale: Specifies the contributions made by each author.

funding.rationale: Acknowledges financial support that facilitated the research.
